title: ctrlverge optimize
description: An Integration Pack｜Enjoy masa mods while boosting performance!
body:
# Optimized Integration Pack ｜ ctrlVerge

# 注意：attention!
- 此整合包包含生电模组MASA                  
- 整合包不要用PCL2 BakaXL HMCL的一键更新功能！
- 这可能导致mod的大量冲突(并且可能导致性能下降!)
- Includes auxiliary modules,  which may be considered cheating on some servers.  
- Integration packs do not use the PCL2 BakaXL HMCL one-click update feature!
- This can cause a lot of conflicts with mods (and can cause performance degradation!)
## 整合包介绍
Integration Pack Introduction
_Even if you have a 10 year old computer you can get 60 fps!__即使你的电脑是10年前的电脑 也可以跑到60帧！__
**My macbookpro2015 with i7-4770hq processor can reach 100fps in multiplayer games!**
- Single-player performance
- See my gallery!

在i7-4770hq的骨灰级核显下，~~使得光影帧数达到30fps~~**使用make up光影可达到40-60fps!**
With the i7-4770hq's Ashes to Ashes core graphics, it makes light and shadow framerates up to 30fps using make up light and shadow up to 40-60fps!
The jade mod will have an error on some multiplayer servers, please disable it if you encounter it!
